description: This workshop discusses common issues faced when building UX-friendly Solana Dapps, focusing on transaction confirmation levels, RPC requests, and user experience improvements.
topic_summary: The presentation covers four main problems encountered in Dapp development, including transaction confirmation issues [t=93:19], RPC request batching [t=220:51], and user experience design choices [t=281:39].
aliases: Breakpoint2021: A Guide to Making UX Friendly Solana Dapps
